name: Healthcare evidence preview
niche: Clinics, dentists, and public-facing medical businesses
offer: Evidence-backed website diagnostic with an owner-approved implementation option
callToAction: Would a concise implementation outline be useful?
messageVariants: Software assisted this public-page review. Use one stored issue, one commercial implication, one low-friction CTA, and a respectful opt-out.
Reference only the selected evidence excerpt and affected page. Do not add unsupported praise, urgency, metrics, or claims.
prohibitedClaims: manual review when software performed the review
